---
title: "Notes to Self"
pagetitle: "Blog | Jiwoo Shin"
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  page-size: 10
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, author, reading-time, title, description, categories, image]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

<script>
(() => {
  const setTitle = () => {
    document.title = "Blog | Jiwoo Shin";
  };
  const setPostCount = () => {
    const listing = window["quarto-listings"] && window["quarto-listings"]["listing-listing"];
    const count = listing && listing.items
      ? listing.items.length
      : document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing-default .quarto-post").length;
    const countEl = document.querySelector("#post-count-number");
    if (countEl) {
      countEl.textContent = String(count);
    }
  };
  const moveAbout = () => {
    const about = document.getElementById("sidebar-about");
    const sidebar = document.getElementById("quarto-margin-sidebar");
    if (about && sidebar) {
      sidebar.insertBefore(about, sidebar.firstChild);
    }
  };
  setTitle();
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    setPostCount();
    moveAbout();
  });
  window.addEventListener("load", () => {
    setTitle();
    setPostCount();
  });
})();
</script>

::: {.post-count}
Total posts <span id="post-count-number"></span>
:::

::: {#sidebar-about .sidebar-about}
![](profile.jpg){.sidebar-about-photo}

**Jiwoo Shin**

Incoming M.S. student at KAIST Graduate School of AI.

Notes on AI research, papers, and everyday things I want to remember.

[More about me →](https://jiwooshin-kr.github.io/)
:::
